title: WOS Studio (Authoring) — Studio-to-WOS Mapping
description: StudioToWosMapping records per studio-authoring/specs/studio-to-wos-mapping.md and CONCEPT-MODEL.md §1.11. Each mapping declares one of the four mapping states (mapsToWos | authoringOnly | requiresSpecExtension | unmappedButApproved) for a PolicyObject. The four states encode the authoring-vocabulary-vs-substrate split named in CM §5 'WOS as canonical substrate'. Top-level document MAY carry one mapping or a `mappings[]` collection.
$comment: Promotion status (Stage-3, 2026-05-01): MVP shape; the `targets[]` shape (for mapsToWos state) and `extensionRecord` shape (for requiresSpecExtension state) are illustrative — Stage-4 lint enforces precedence + per-state required fields.

$wosStudioMapping.description: Document marker pinning this artifact to the Studio Mapping 1.0 schema.

x-lm.intent: Document type marker for Studio-to-WOS Mapping artifacts

workspaceId.description: Workspace this mapping (or mapping collection) belongs to.

subjectPolicyObjectRef.description: PolicyObject id this mapping applies to.

mappingState.description: How the PolicyObject relates to the WOS substrate. Precedence: mapsToWos > authoringOnly > requiresSpecExtension > unmappedButApproved.

x-lm.intent: Mapping state — load-bearing for compilation routing and reviewer attestation requirements

targets.description: Target descriptors when mappingState = mapsToWos. Each carries wosJsonPath (projection target) + shapeRef (closest WOS $def or block path) + optional fieldBindings + reviewer rationale.

shapeRef.description: Citation of closest WOS $def or block path. May be an authoritative $ref URL when a $def exists, or prose path otherwise (per CM §6.1 corrected pattern, 2026-05-01).

fieldBindings.description: Per-field map from Studio body fields → WOS schema fields.

extensionRecord.description: Required when mappingState = requiresSpecExtension. Captures the candidate WOS-side extension proposal.

proposedSeam.description: Which of the six canonical kernel seams (per parent ADR-0077) this extension would attach to.

extensionsApplied.description: Extension keys (e.g., x-canonical-term, x-dpv-sensitivity) applied during projection per ADR-0077 patternProperties.

unmappedRationale.description: Required when mappingState = unmappedButApproved. Documented reason the PolicyObject is acceptable without a WOS counterpart.
